isc.criterion: Exports clamp(v, min, max) constraining v to [min, max]
isc.evidence: src/util/math.ts: clamp returns lo/hi bounded value

isc.criterion: Exports lerp(a, b, t) linear interpolation
clamp handles min > max gracefully (returns a defined, documented result)
isc.evidence: math.ts: swaps via Math.min/Math.max, documented in JSDoc

isc.criterion: Tests cover in-range, below-min, above-max, and t=0/0.5/1
isc.evidence: math.test.ts: four tests covering all stated cases

summary: Two tidy, well-documented math helpers with thorough edge-case tests. Strong.
